LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-30-2026 RE: MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CCH) ***AFTER HEARING, JUDGMENT IS EXECUTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Of Forfeiture
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Default Judgment Of Forfeiture.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion is granted. The Court will sign the Default Judgment.

***After hearing, judgment is executed.

Judge: Christopher C. Hite. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CCH)
